examples: Introducing the structure, use principle, survey range and use method, to assure effectively the processing precision of gear wheal shaft.
10 healthy volunteers were chosen for histamine prick test and observed the inhibitory action of mizolastine on the histamine induced wheal.
Elsewhere, an extra pump has been brought in to help stop water from the old Wheal Jane tin mine overflowing.
At Wheal Jane, the extra pump is part of efforts to help stop water from the mine overflowing and polluting the Carnon valley.
